description: Create a Piping and Instrumentation Diagram (P&ID) for a chemical feed pre-heating loop in Wondershare EdrawMax. The diagram must include a Vertical Tank labeled 'T-100', a Centrifugal Pump labeled 'P-101', and a Shell and Tube Heat Exchanger labeled 'E-102'. Establish a flow path from the bottom of Tank 'T-100' to the Pump 'P-101' inlet, from the Pump 'P-101' outlet to the Heat Exchanger 'E-102' inlet, and an outlet pipe leaving the Heat Exchanger terminating with an arrow. Incorporate a Gate Valve on the line between the tank and pump, a Check Valve immediately after the pump, and a Control Valve on the line entering the heat exchanger. Include the title 'Unit 100: Feed Pre-heating Loop' at the top of the diagram. Save the project to /home/ga/Diagrams/pid_unit100.eddx and export the final diagram to /home/ga/Diagrams/pid_unit100.pdf.
